businessBackground: [INFERENCE — pre-filing] GetBusy plc is a UK-listed (AIM) micro-cap software holding company whose principal asset is **SmartVault**, a verticalized document-management and client-portal SaaS embedded across all major US tax-preparation platforms (Intuit ProConnect, Lacerte, Drake, ProSeries, UltraTax, CCH). Secondary products: **Workiro** (cloud-native document workflow, UK/ANZ) and **Virtual Cabinet** (legacy on-prem DMS being migrated to Workiro). Group revenue model is recurring SaaS (ARR-anchored) with high gross retention and embedded workflow switching costs. SmartVault is the primar...
catalysts: ~Mar 2027: FY2026 Annual Report + AI revenue disclosure

pm.archetypeName: F-primary (AI/Tech Disruption Beneficiary, Misclassified vertical-SaaS at sub-1.5x ARR with shipped AI features) with G-secondary lens (Derived-Demand Monopoly position embedded in US tax-prep workflow ecosystem). Archetype B (Compounder Mispriced) not in canonical pool — F captures the AI-amplification + misclassification thesis better; G captures the embedded-niche monopoly economics in CPA/tax-prep document workflow.

flex.name: Data/Network Moat Depth
flex.rationale: 650M doc corpus + 5-platform integration = workflow moat; sub-monopoly vs. NetDocuments/iManage

flex.name: AI Integration Maturity
flex.rationale: SmartRequestAI shipped; AI capex visible (£0.3M FY25 EBITDA); no quantified AI revenue uplift yet

flex.name: Disruption Misperception
flex.rationale: Discovery-gap mispricing (AIM neglect + SaaS reset) more than active AI-fear narrative

universal.name: Mispricing Assessment
universal.rationale: PW-FV 235p (+218%); 3 legs (organic ARR + multiple re-rate + M&A); bear -9% at-the-money floor; bounded binaries; no STRUCTURAL-unaddressed cause

universal.name: Repricing Mechanism
universal.rationale: H1 FY2026 interims as next dated proof point; SmartVault $20M ARR threshold catalyst; EVIDENTIAL tier; sale-event optionality is mgmt-discretionary

universal.name: Business Quality
universal.rationale: Embedded workflow position, 650M docs, 6,000 CPA firms, multi-platform integration; not monopoly; FY2025 EBITDA depressed

universal.name: Balance Sheet & Torque (GATE)
universal.rationale: Net cash £0.9M, available cash £3.9M, no material debt; gate cleared (>= 2); buffer adequate not abundant

rcChecklist.evidence: Pattern-match score 27/35 Interesting-High (Archetype F+G) — MONITORING justification: 1pt shy of STRONG, multiple promotable upgrade paths within 6-12 months (H1 FY26 interims, AI revenue disclosure, $20M ARR cross)

rcChecklist.criterion: Latest annual filing (10-K/20-F) reviewed within 12 months
rcChecklist.evidence: run filing-review on a 10-K/20-F/10-Q within 12 months

rcChecklist.criterion: ≥2 earnings transcripts reviewed (or waived if ticker has no transcripts available)

rcChecklist.evidence: run catalyst-tracker or add to THESIS Catalyst Timeline

rcChecklist.criterion: debate-session run across all 6 pressure vectors
conviction-scoring + cross-model-validation council both complete; angels-advocate if band ≥ HIGH_CONVICTION
